rationale: Gov't Code §2161.002 governs comptroller administration of historically underutilized business contracting rules. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts; no conflict arises.
quote:
Sec. 2161.002. ADMINISTRATION; RULES. (a) To administer Subchapters B and C, the comptroller may:
(1) require information from a state agency; and
(2) adopt rules.
_note: Rule text concerns HUB program administration, not property tax exemptions; no overlap with proposed change.
